title: Rich & Adventurous Polish Chicken Stir-fry
description: A rich and dense Polish dish featuring birds-eye chilis in a keto-friendly, spicy chicken stir-fry.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Season chicken with salt and pepper. Add to the pan and sauté until golden brown on all sides.
Add minced garlic and cook for another minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Stir in tomato paste, chicken broth concentrate, and butter. Simmer for 2 minutes, allowing flavors to meld together.
Toss in the peppers and continue cooking for an additional 3-4 minutes.
Sprinkle with pepper flakes (if using) and stir well. Cook for another minute to combine all ingredients.
Divide into serving plates immediately after removing from heat for best flavor retention.
